calendar.matters:
Petition For Orders (1)Directing Payment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement; (2) Awarding Attorneys' Fees And Costs Pursuant To Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christina Galagher Nelson for Amelia Craig (Conservator). John Fraker and Leon Ainer for and with Sandraline Cederwall.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their position with regard to jurisdiction, discovery being/not being allowed and whether the matter should be before an Arbitrator. The matter was taken under submission. Counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order which is to address 1)whether the matter should be heard in Probate or Civil 2)whether it is to be heard by an Arbitrator/if so, Counsel is to provide two proposed Arbitrator's names each 3)grant or deny discovery and indicate a 60 day completion date. Mr. Fraker's request for the Court to rule on the personal liabilty issue is denied without prejudice and is to be determined by the Judicial Officer who hears the matter. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
